title: Brady Rippon
text: Hello! I’m a biostatistician and research software developer with interests in clinical research tools, statistical programming, and reproducible research designs.

title: Brady Rippon
text:
What I’m working on


R Packages
Reusable tools for project scaffolding, reporting templates, and reproducible workflows.


Research
Projects focused on clinical research, emergency preparedness, and health systems analysis.


Reports & Dashboards
Quarto, R Markdown, Shiny, and automated reporting workflows.
